MINI MINUTES: JPT Norman Nayfach, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not Reported. (218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority represented by Kim Reeder.
Attorneys Arnold W. Evje and Cindy Lee appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant Brandy L. Hayes is present.
Limited Scope Attorney Ben Cukierman appearing for the defendant.

This matter comes on calendar for a Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. Judge Pro Tem, counsel and litigants confer privately for settlement discussions.

Settlement reached, no terms put on the record, trial date is off calendar.
